calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-011 second source validation: harm_history input resolves D3 reversal
items.notes: 2-condition ablation (WITH_HISTORY vs WITHOUT_HISTORY), 3 seeds. Tests that harm_history_len=10 resolves the D3 reversal (r2_a > r2_s) seen in EXQ-241. Phased: P0=100ep training, P1=50ep eval.

items.title: SD-020: z_harm_a surprise PE training vs raw accumulation
items.notes: 3-condition (RAW_ACCUM, SURPRISE_PE, COMBINED) x 3 seeds. Tests Chen 2023 claim: AIC encodes PE not raw state. C1: surprise urgency_corr > raw urgency_corr. C2: surprise stream_corr < raw stream_corr.

items.title: SD-021: descending pain modulation during commitment
items.notes: 2-condition (NO_DESCENDING, WITH_DESCENDING) x 3 seeds. Tests whether commitment-gated z_harm_s attenuation (alpha=0.3) enables goal-directed behavior through hazards without reckless harm-seeking.

items.title: MECH-220: cross-stream harm hub coordination
items.notes: 3-condition (NO_HUB, S_TO_A_HUB, BIDI_HUB) x 3 seeds. Tests whether lightweight cross-stream gating (z_harm_s norm -> z_harm_a context) improves forward model R^2 and maintains stream distinctness.
